violations.description: Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Observed cold hold, freezers and refrigerators were missing thermometers.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Surface around grill and cooking area not cleaned as frequently as needed.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed filters and surface around inside of the hood contained a bill up of grease. Recommend cleaning more frequently.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with self closing door.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed floors contained build up of grease and debris.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Food items in cooler and freezer were not properly date marked.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor, walls, ceiling needed to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling in storage area falling down.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
